message:
chore: README test count + rustfmt acos/log1p oracle suites

- README.md: bump test-count badge 3487 → 3542 (+55 tests across
  the recent oracle suite landings — predominantly from the new
  acos / asin / log1p / square / logistic / expm1 per-primitive
  harnesses).
- crates/fj-conformance/tests/acos_oracle.rs: rustfmt collapsed a
  couple of `assert!(... extract_f64_scalar(&result).is_nan(),
  "acos(±inf) = NaN")` calls onto single lines that fit within
  the 100-col budget.
- crates/fj-conformance/tests/log1p_oracle.rs: same pattern, plus
  a couple of multi-line `eval_primitive(...)` calls re-collapsed.

Pure formatting + docs follow-up; no test logic changed and no
new test added in this commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
